text:
The paper exists on protocols.io, but the cited title is slightly truncated — the real full title includes the subtitle "A Step-by-Step Guide with 3D U-Net." The URL in the reference (`gz4sbx8wf`) points to a version that the automated checker reported as non-existent, while search results show related protocols.io pages with similar but distinct slugs (`gz4sbx8wf.html` and `g9rgbz53x`). The author "Fatima Adebayo" could not be confirmed from search results, but the paper itself appears to be a real protocols.io entry with a closely matching (truncated) title.

VERDICT: UNCERTAIN
EXPLANATION: A real protocols.io protocol with a closely matching title ("Lightweight Brain Tumor Segmentation on Low-Resource Systems: A Step-by-Step Guide with 3D U-Net") does exist, but the cited title is truncated and the specific URL slug in the reference (`gz4sbx8wf`) could not be confirmed as live. The author "Fatima Adebayo" could not be verified from available search results.
LINK: https://www.protocols.io/view/lightweight-brain-tumor-segmentation-on-low-resour-gz4sbx8wf.html
